title: New RTLIL parser rejects previously and supposedly still valid RTLIL
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.58+35 (git sha1 71eadc9ab, g++ 15.2.1)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

In a Yosys build prior to ac4cb5e4, the following RTLIL is accepted:

```
module \meow
	wire width 8 \nya
	wire width 8 output 1 \mrrp
	wire width 1 input 0 \purr
	process $cat
		assign \nya { \mrrp \purr } [7:0]
	end
end
```

Post ac4cb5e4 this is rejected with a parser error


### Expected Behavior

Parsed as valid RTLIL

### Actual Behavior

```
1. Executing RTLIL frontend.
Input filename: mvp.il
ERROR: Parser error in line 6: Expected EOL, got `[7:0]'.
```
code_blocks:
module \meow
	wire width 8 \nya
	wire width 8 output 1 \mrrp
	wire width 1 input 0 \purr
	process $cat
		assign \nya { \mrrp \purr } [7:0]
	end
end

1. Executing RTLIL frontend.
Input filename: mvp.il
ERROR: Parser error in line 6: Expected EOL, got `[7:0]'.
